zh.Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾普倫德加斯特
zh.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston是Henry Kynaston的女兒，於1252年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾。她於1272年與Peter Parriet在威爾士布洛可爾普倫德加斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾普倫德加斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston是Henry Kynaston的女儿，于1252年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾。她于1272年与Peter Parriet在威尔士布洛可爾普倫德加斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Caniston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Coniston (ER Yorks), Cold Coniston (WR Yorks), Conistone (WR Yorks), or Church Coniston (Lancs).

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Mable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston was born in 1252, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Henry Kynaston. She married Peter Parriet in 1272, in Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston est née en 1252, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Henry Kynaston. Elle a épousé Peter Parriet en 1272, à Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston wurde 1252 in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Henry Kynaston geboren. Sie hat 1272 in Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales Peter Parriet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

ht.Heroldstone,Pembroke,Wales: Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston è nata il nel 1252 nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlia di Henry Kynaston. Lei sposato Peter Parriet nel 1272, nel Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynastonは1252年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでHenry Kynastonの娘として生まれた。1272年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアプレンデルガストでPeter Parrietと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston(은)는 1252년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Henry Kynaston의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1272년 웨일스 p브로케실르 프렌더가스트에서 Peter Parriet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

mg.Heroldstone,Pembroke,Wales: Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston nasceu em 1252, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Henry Kynaston. Ela casou-se com Peter Parriet em 1272, em Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston родилась в 1252 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её отца звали Henry Kynaston. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Parriet в 1272 г. в местности прендиргаст, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mable or Mary Caniston or Kynaston nació en 1252, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hija de Henry Kynaston. Se casó con Peter Parriet en 1272, en Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
